name: Prav
description: Whether you want to text your friends and family, or to make calls, Prav app makes it easy for you. It provides convenient onboarding and user-friendly interface. We believe privacy is a fundamental right and should be easily exercised by anyone. With Prav, your chats are private and only you can read them https://prav.app/privacy-policy/. It is based on XMPP protocol, so users can talk to any other XMPP users all over the world, without being locked-in to a service. Prav's source code is available publicly under a free license, providing transparency and audatibility.
